typography.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter uppercase font-black leading-none

layout_patterns.hero: 100vh full-bleed, content bottom-left aligned over dark image overlay

buttons.primary: bg-transparent border border-[#D4AF37] text-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#D4AF37] hover:text-[#0A0A0A] transition-colors duration-300 px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors duration-300 px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm

cards.service_card: bg-[#121212] border border-white/5 hover:border-[#D4AF37]/30 p-8 transition-all duration-500 hover:-translate-y-2 group

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Lenis smooth scrolling mandatory for premium momentum feel
motion_and_interactions.reveal: Framer Motion 'fade up' and 'mask reveal' on scroll for typography and images
motion_and_interactions.hover: Images scale up slightly (1.05) inside hidden overflow containers; borders glow gold on hover
motion_and_interactions.parallax: Subtle y-axis parallax on hero images and large typography

images.description: Dark luxury modern home exterior at night (Hero Background)

media.overlays: Hero images must have a bg-black/50 to bg-black/70 gradient overlay to ensure text contrast

sections_structure.name: Hero
sections_structure.details: Background image, 'Crafting Premium Aluminium Spaces', 'Precision. Durability. Design Excellence since 1998', buttons: Explore Products, Get Quote

sections_structure.name: Brand Statement
sections_structure.details: Massive text: 'Built with Precision. Designed for Modern Living.' Parallax effect.

sections_structure.name: About
sections_structure.details: Established 1998, serving Indore & Dewas, 20+ years expertise. Side by side image and text.

sections_structure.name: Services
sections_structure.details: Grid of services: Sliding Windows, Casement Windows, Domal, Doors, Partitions, Invisible Grills. Dark cards with subtle border.

sections_structure.name: Product Showcase
sections_structure.details: Horizontal scrolling section for Windows, Doors, Partitions using Framer Motion.

sections_structure.name: Why Choose Us
sections_structure.details: Premium materials, expert craftsmanship. Large numbers and minimal text.

sections_structure.name: Projects
sections_structure.details: Masonry grid of project images with hover zoom effects.

sections_structure.name: Custom Solutions
sections_structure.details: Custom profiles, powder coating. Gold accented section.

sections_structure.name: Footer
sections_structure.details: Black + gold aesthetic, large logo mark, minimal links.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme (#0A0A0A base) with #D4AF37 gold accents.
Do NOT use generic Shadcn button styles. Use the customized primary/secondary button styles defined in components.
Use Framer Motion for section reveals (fade up, stagger children) and image masks.
Images MUST NOT be used as pure backgrounds without heavy dark overlays (bg-black/50 minimum) to maintain text readability.
No pure white text on light backgrounds; always test against #0A0A0A.
